About DM Tuition

Tutors who actually get it

AGSB
Year 12

DM Tuition is run by Daniel Stevenson and Mazin Elma, Year 12 students at Altrincham Grammar School for Boys — one of the most academically rigorous schools in the country.

We understand the pressures of GCSEs and 11+ exams because we've been through them ourselves. Our sessions are focused, practical, and tailored specifically to what works in exam conditions.

🎓Run by AGSB students with real, recent exam experience
📊Focused on exam technique and performance, not just content
📍In-person (Altrincham) or online via video call
💬Personal, relaxed sessions with real academic rigour

The Process

Simple to get started

1
Enquire

Send us a message via Instagram, Facebook, email or the form below. Tell us what subject and level.

2
Free Intro

We offer a free introductory session so you can see exactly how we work before committing.

3
Get Matched

We tailor each session to your syllabus, learning style, and the specific areas you need to improve.

4
Perform

With focused exam prep and personalised support, you walk into that exam ready to achieve your best.
